raw_response:
Disagree; although the brain does develop substantially after birth, it is not the only part of the body that shows extensive post-natal development. For example, eyes continue to refine their visual acuity well into early childhood. However, given the emphasis placed on the brain’s prolonged developmental phase during discussions about cognitive functions and behavior, I still concur that among the listed options, "brain" remains the best fit. Therefore, my final selection stands with Option B - Brain.

Answer Choice: B
